scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:employee" "npm run dev:manager" "npm run dev:tenant" "npm run dev:superadmin"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix employee && npm install --prefix manager && npm install --prefix tenant && npm install --prefix superadmin
scripts.build:all: npm run build --prefix employee && npm run build --prefix manager && npm run build --prefix tenant && npm run build --prefix superadmin
